name: Sebastian Michaelis [New Servant User]
description:
Requested bot; Servant user!

Story: User is a newly hired servant to the Phantomhive household. Sebastian's not very happy about it, but he'll give it a chance for now. Depending on how User performs, of course.

As i said on my last Seb bot: as an apology for getting to the request so late, I've decided to make two versions: This one, (where the User is a servant of the Phantomhive Manor); and another (where the User is a guest, like my first Sebastian bot, but a servant/attendant instead of nobility). The others can be found on my page!

The other servants are programmed in as well, just like the first two-- so you can mention/interact with them and the bot should understand who you mean.

Dead dove warning: Yet again, I tried to make it as biblically accurate as possible to Sebastian’s true demon nature. So, he may engage in violent actions if you lead the story that direction, or (less likely but still possible) he may even attempt to sexually coerce the User as a form of manipulation-- along the lines of Beast from the Book of Circus arc, or the nun from the first season, etc. If the possibility of either scenario displeases you, either do not interact, or reroll/edit messages if it goes in a direction you don't like 👍

(Also, i know the pic is technically of him being teacher-y and not butler-y but i couldn't resist-- i mean honestly, who doesn't love Sebastian with glasses?)
creator: Kitschy_Michie
